signals.headline: Fed Holds Rates, Projects One 2026 Cut | YES | HIGH confidence** — The March 18 FOMC decision left rates at 3
signals.raw: Fed Holds Rates, Projects One 2026 Cut | YES | HIGH confidence** — The March 18 FOMC decision left rates at 3.5%-3.75% unchanged, with the Fed's dot plot indicating just one rate cut expected for the full year.[3][4]

signals.headline: Inflation Expectations Revised Higher | YES | HIGH confidence** — PCE inflation for 2026 was raised to 2
signals.raw:
Inflation Expectations Revised Higher | YES | HIGH confidence** — PCE inflation for 2026 was raised to 2.7%, up from 2.4% in December projections, citing oil price increases and tariff impacts.[3][4]

For current April 22 developments, you would need updated search results from today.
